summary: Tested device mockup video generation API with iphone_compositor.py v8. All 15 tests passed (7 unit tests + 8 API tests). CRITICAL requirement verified: Phone is ALWAYS FULLY VISIBLE at all animation frames due to phone_scale_start=0.50 and phone_scale_end=0.75 (both < 1.0).
passed_tests: Invalid URL rejection - returns 400 for external URLs
Nonexistent file rejection - returns 404 for missing files
Camera animation style (zoom+rotate) - creates 9:16 video successfully
Float animation style (simple floating) - creates 9:16 video successfully
16:9 landscape format - creates video with correct dimensions
Unit: render_dynamic_phone has all required parameters
Unit: Camera animation scale parameters ensure FULL VISIBILITY (0.50, 0.75 both < 1.0)
Unit: Float animation creates frame without error
Unit: Phone stays within margins at all progress points (0.0, 0.25, 0.5, 0.75, 1.0)
critical_code_review_comments: iphone_compositor.py v8 correctly implements phone_scale_start=0.50 and phone_scale_end=0.75, ensuring phone is ALWAYS FULLY VISIBLE
Margins enforced: margin_x=10% and margin_y=8% of screen dimensions prevent phone from being cropped
render_camera_animation() implements zoom+rotate with perspective distortion factored into size calculations
render_simple_float() provides gentler floating animation with oscillating rotation (±15°)
create_gradient_background() creates proper radial gradient with optional spotlight effect
All three position options (center/left/right) correctly clamp phone to safe bounds
Both 9:16 (1080x1920) and 16:9 (1920x1080) output formats work correctly
seed_data_creation: Created test videos: device_623f75ee (camera 9:16), device_6bfe5a69 (float 9:16), device_dd783364 (16:9 landscape), device_56a248a1 (left position), device_69ab5a25 (right position), device_7064f4f7 (blue gradient).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Device mockup API at POST /api/device-mockup/create works with iphone_compositor.py v8. KEY FEATURE: Phone is ALWAYS FULLY VISIBLE due to phone_scale_start=0.50 and phone_scale_end=0.75 with 10% horizontal and 8% vertical margins. Animation styles: 'camera' (zoom+rotate), 'float' (simple), 'phone_text' (with text). Aspect ratios: '9:16' portrait (1080x1920), '16:9' landscape (1920x1080). Phone positions: center/left/right. Test with test_short_3sec.mp4 for fast results (video generation takes ~15-30 seconds).

iphone_compositor_v8.phone_always_visible: YES - confirmed at all progress points
